blocks.content: Cade found Wren in the hallway upstairs around eight.
She was standing outside Marcus's door. Not close to it — just at the end of the hall, looking at the crime scene tape. The yellow line across a door they would never open again the same way.
She looked at him. Then back at the door.

blocks.speaker: Wren
blocks.content: Saturday night. After we heard the argument. After it stopped. We were all at the table, and then people were getting up and moving around. Dean got a refill. Sophie went for the wine. I used the bathroom.

blocks.speaker: Wren
blocks.content: And at some point — I'm not sure exactly when — I came back to the table and someone wasn't there.

blocks.speaker: Wren
blocks.content: I'm not sure. It was a few minutes. And then they were back and the conversation moved on and I didn't think about it at the time.

blocks.speaker: Cade
blocks.content: Wren. You need to tell Davenport that.
She looked at the door one more time. Then she went back downstairs.
